name: @forwardimpact/libskill
description: Derive skill matrices, agent profiles, and job definitions from standard data — the engineering standard made queryable.
author: D. Olsson <hi@senzilla.io>

jobs.trigger: Building a product feature that needs skill matrices or job definitions and realizing the YAML is raw data, not queryable structure.
jobs.bigHire: turn engineering standard definitions into queryable, derivable data.
jobs.littleHire: derive a skill matrix or agent profile without parsing YAML by hand.
jobs.competesWith: parsing YAML files directly; hardcoding role definitions; skipping derivation and displaying raw data
